TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Losing Watan lalu nya hiya, lalu nya Nipun hiya ga Nu Saburo, qutux seng spat kbhul qesux pgal qesux ryax spat byaling mpux tiyu ryax htagn nya sta qutux seng qesux kbhul miman payat ryax payat byaling mpux pitu ryax mpyut ro hnuqil, hiya ga cquliq Tayal mc;ubuy squliq hngiyang nya, hiya ga mrhuw na Taywan Genzyuminrok, piyux calay shiyu na ke hiya wayal bhlun Kokuminto na Cina ro wayal naha pqilun ryax na Kwiran na mlabuw sbhul. qutux seng qesux kbhul pusan qutux ryax tmsuqan pinqwasan nya bih "Tajvano Reganto medicina lernejo" qutux seng qesux kbhul pusan qutux ryax mpux byaling ga mbinah qalang Tayal, mnaki bih byaoying na Kowgan, b'bu Kapan, skura nguhux ruma, ru qnazi kya. calay ga twang psbaq yaw na klkah hi, twang sbaq yaw na htgan llaqi, maki calay pintyawan nya yaw igok na qalang na Tayal qa Losing Watan qani, qutux loyi ga musa mtama galan gnbang ke qa Tayal ki Sexu na Nipun qa hiya uyi. kya hayi qutux seng qesux kbhul spatula magal kawas payat ryax nasa gam tama gi-ying qa "Tajvano Guberniestro" tmsuqanminsaying qa pintriqan na cinbwanan qani lga, mbinah kinhulan nya qalang msbtunux kya, ro wayal mtama te qutux cintman na Taywan singgiying ryax qa qutux seng kawas qesux kbhul miman saying ryax nasa, ptnaq kawas kya, kya hayi mupx qutux byaling skura yaw na wayal msqun mlahuy "Takasago familio konsilio", snyan naha Kyosato qa Watan Losing qani ro yupun naha ulu, ryax nasa gluw na Cho qa saying hi ga ptnaqan naha pyapun ro yupun kulu uyi. Bnrwan qa galan cpung .
S.PHON: los~ɕiŋ watan lalu nja ħija, lalu nja nipun ħija ɣa nu s~ɕaβuro, qutux s~ɕeŋ s~ɕpat kβħul qes~ɕux pɣal qes~ɕux rjax s~ɕpat βjaliŋ mpux tiju rjax ħtaɣn nja s~ɕta qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul miman pajat rjax pajat βjaliŋ mpux pitu rjax mpjut ro ħnuqil, ħija ɣa ʦ~ʨquliq tajal mʦ~ʨ;uβuj s~ɕquliq ħŋijaŋ nja, ħija ɣa mrħuw na tajwan ɣenzjuminrok, pijux ʦ~ʨalaj s~ɕħiju na ke ħija wajal βħlun kokuminto na ʦ~ʨina ro wajal naħa pqilun rjax na kwiran na mlaβuw s~ɕβħul. qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul pus~ɕan qutux rjax tms~ɕuqan pinqwas~ɕan nja βiħ "taj*ano reɣanto me*iʦ~ʨina lernejo" qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul pus~ɕan qutux rjax mpux βjaliŋ ɣa mβinaħ qalaŋ tajal, mnaki βiħ βjaojiŋ na kowɣan, βʔβu kapan, s~ɕkura ŋuħux ruma, ru qnazi kja. ʦ~ʨalaj ɣa twaŋ ps~ɕβaq jaw na klkaħ ħi, twaŋ s~ɕβaq jaw na ħtɣan llaqi, maki ʦ~ʨalaj pintjawan nja jaw iɣok na qalaŋ na tajal qa los~ɕiŋ watan qani, qutux loji ɣa mus~ɕa mtama ɣalan ɣnβaŋ ke qa tajal ki s~ɕexu na nipun qa ħija uji. kja ħaji qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul s~ɕpatula maɣal kawas~ɕ pajat rjax nas~ɕa ɣam tama ɣi-jiŋ qa "taj*ano ɣuβernies~ɕtro" tms~ɕuqanmins~ɕajiŋ qa pintriqan na ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani lɣa, mβinaħ kinħulan nja qalaŋ ms~ɕβtunux kja, ro wajal mtama te qutux ʦ~ʨintman na tajwan s~ɕiŋɣijiŋ rjax qa qutux s~ɕeŋ kawas~ɕ qes~ɕux kβħul miman s~ɕajiŋ rjax nas~ɕa, ptnaq kawas~ɕ kja, kja ħaji mupx qutux βjaliŋ s~ɕkura jaw na wajal ms~ɕqun mlaħuj "takas~ɕaɣo *amilio kons~ɕilio", s~ɕnjan naħa kjos~ɕato qa watan los~ɕiŋ qani ro jupun naħa ulu, rjax nas~ɕa ɣluw na ʦ~ʨħo qa s~ɕajiŋ ħi ɣa ptnaqan naħa pjapun ro jupun kulu uji. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ .
S.FORM: Losing Watan lalu nya hiya, lalu nya Nipun hiya ga Nu Saburo, qutux seng spat kbhul qesux pgal qesux ryax spat byaling mpux tiyu ryax htagn nya sta qutux seng qesux kbhul miman payat ryax payat byaling mpux pitu ryax mpyut ro hnuqil, hiya ga cquliq Tayal mc;ubuy squliq hngiyang nya, hiya ga mrhuw na Taywan Genzyuminrok, piyux calay shiyu na ke hiya wayal bhlun Kokuminto na Cina ro wayal naha pqilun ryax na Kwiran na mlabuw sbhul. qutux seng qesux kbhul pusan qutux ryax tmsuqan pinqwasan nya bih "Tajvano Reganto medicina lernejo" qutux seng qesux kbhul pusan qutux ryax mpux byaling ga mbinah qalang Tayal, mnaki bih byaoying na Kowgan, b'bu Kapan, skura nguhux ruma, ru qnazi kya. calay ga twang psbaq yaw na klkah hi, twang sbaq yaw na htgan llaqi, maki calay pintyawan nya yaw igok na qalang na Tayal qa Losing Watan qani, qutux loyi ga musa mtama galan gnbang ke qa Tayal ki Sexu na Nipun qa hiya uyi. kya hayi qutux seng qesux kbhul spatula magal kawas payat ryax nasa gam tama gi-ying qa "Tajvano Guberniestro" tmsuqanminsaying qa pintriqan na cinbwanan qani lga, mbinah kinhulan nya qalang msbtunux kya, ro wayal mtama te qutux cintman na Taywan singgiying ryax qa qutux seng kawas qesux kbhul miman saying ryax nasa, ptnaq kawas kya, kya hayi mupx qutux byaling skura yaw na wayal msqun mlahuy "Takasago familio konsilio", snyan naha Kyosato qa Watan Losing qani ro yupun naha ulu, ryax nasa gluw na Cho qa saying hi ga ptnaqan naha pyapun ro yupun kulu uyi. Bnrwan qa galan cpung .
S.PHON: los~ɕiŋ watan lalu nja ħija, lalu nja nipun ħija ɣa nu s~ɕaβuro, qutux s~ɕeŋ s~ɕpat kβħul qes~ɕux pɣal qes~ɕux rjax s~ɕpat βjaliŋ mpux tiju rjax ħtaɣn nja s~ɕta qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul miman pajat rjax pajat βjaliŋ mpux pitu rjax mpjut ro ħnuqil, ħija ɣa ʦ~ʨquliq tajal mʦ~ʨ;uβuj s~ɕquliq ħŋijaŋ nja, ħija ɣa mrħuw na tajwan ɣenzjuminrok, pijux ʦ~ʨalaj s~ɕħiju na ke ħija wajal βħlun kokuminto na ʦ~ʨina ro wajal naħa pqilun rjax na kwiran na mlaβuw s~ɕβħul. qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul pus~ɕan qutux rjax tms~ɕuqan pinqwas~ɕan nja βiħ "taj*ano reɣanto me*iʦ~ʨina lernejo" qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul pus~ɕan qutux rjax mpux βjaliŋ ɣa mβinaħ qalaŋ tajal, mnaki βiħ βjaojiŋ na kowɣan, βʔβu kapan, s~ɕkura ŋuħux ruma, ru qnazi kja. ʦ~ʨalaj ɣa twaŋ ps~ɕβaq jaw na klkaħ ħi, twaŋ s~ɕβaq jaw na ħtɣan llaqi, maki ʦ~ʨalaj pintjawan nja jaw iɣok na qalaŋ na tajal qa los~ɕiŋ watan qani, qutux loji ɣa mus~ɕa mtama ɣalan ɣnβaŋ ke qa tajal ki s~ɕexu na nipun qa ħija uji. kja ħaji qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul s~ɕpatula maɣal kawas~ɕ pajat rjax nas~ɕa ɣam tama ɣi-jiŋ qa "taj*ano ɣuβernies~ɕtro" tms~ɕuqanmins~ɕajiŋ qa pintriqan na ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani lɣa, mβinaħ kinħulan nja qalaŋ ms~ɕβtunux kja, ro wajal mtama te qutux ʦ~ʨintman na tajwan s~ɕiŋɣijiŋ rjax qa qutux s~ɕeŋ kawas~ɕ qes~ɕux kβħul miman s~ɕajiŋ rjax nas~ɕa, ptnaq kawas~ɕ kja, kja ħaji mupx qutux βjaliŋ s~ɕkura jaw na wajal ms~ɕqun mlaħuj "takas~ɕaɣo *amilio kons~ɕilio", s~ɕnjan naħa kjos~ɕato qa watan los~ɕiŋ qani ro jupun naħa ulu, rjax nas~ɕa ɣluw na ʦ~ʨħo qa s~ɕajiŋ ħi ɣa ptnaqan naħa pjapun ro jupun kulu uji. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ .
